narrative:
Copley-Fairlawn City Sd city school district has 17,057 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.5% D−R vs +3.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
